profile: Support Engineer with over 5 years of experience in technical troubleshooting, customer operations, and support infrastructure for SaaS and B2B platforms. Managed support operations across multiple enterprise products, maintaining strong customer satisfaction scores and consistent SLA compliance. Specializes in API integration issues, communication platform debugging, and AI product troubleshooting with a high first-contact resolution rate. Built comprehensive knowledge bases that reduced inbound ticket volume by 30% and improved average resolution time. Implemented AI-assisted triage workflows using n8n and ChatGPT integration to automate ticket categorization and routing. Experienced in onboarding and training enterprise clients across multi-region deployments.

projects.name: Talky Walky – AI English Practice
projects.description: Language-learning platform where students practice English with an AI tutor, while teachers can review transcripts, add feedback, or join conversations.
features: Managed user onboarding support and troubleshooting for students and teachers across the platform
Built comprehensive help documentation and FAQ knowledge bases for common user issues
Designed escalation workflows for conversation quality issues and AI tutor response accuracy
Implemented feedback collection pipelines for continuous improvement of the AI tutoring experience

projects.name: JustBeMe.ai – AI Business Assistant
projects.description: AI assistant automating inbound/outbound communications across calls, WhatsApp, SMS, and email, with knowledge base answers and real-time appointment booking.
features: Provided technical support for multi-channel communication setup (WhatsApp, SMS, voice, email) across client deployments
Built and maintained the internal knowledge base for troubleshooting AI assistant configuration issues
Designed support runbooks for handling communication failures, appointment booking errors, and API integration issues
Managed client onboarding and training for the AI assistant platform across UAE and France variants

projects.name: Motivational Alarm App
projects.description: AI-powered alarm that generates motivational stories (quotes + images) based on personal goals, using eye-detection to ensure the user is fully awake.
features: Provided end-user support for alarm configuration, goal setup, and eye-detection troubleshooting
Built troubleshooting guides for common issues with camera access, alarm triggers, and content generation
Managed bug reporting workflows and coordinated with engineering for issue resolution
Created user feedback collection processes for improving the motivational content experience
